evals.prompt: I want to add MatrixScan AR to my Flutter app. Here's my starter page: EmptyPage.dart. I need to scan EAN-13 and Code 128 barcodes and highlight each one with a rectangle overlay.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads integration.md, writes complete BarcodeAr integration code into EmptyPage.dart (BLoC + page widget with BarcodeArHighlightProvider), and shows the setup checklist (pub packages to add, flutter pub get, iOS Info.plist, Android runtime permission).

assertions.text: Setup checklist is shown (mentions scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode and flutter pub get)
Setup checklist mentions iOS NSCameraUsageDescription in ios/Runner/Info.plist
Setup checklist mentions Android runtime camera permission (via permission_handler)
await ScanditFlutterDataCaptureBarcode.initialize() is present in main() before runApp
WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized() is called before the await
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is present
'-- ENTER YOUR SCANDIT LICENSE KEY HERE --' is present
BarcodeAr( settings ) is used to construct the mode (Flutter constructor form, no context argument)
Symbology.ean13Upca is enabled
Symbology.code128 is enabled
One of BarcodeArView.forMode(, BarcodeArView.forModeWithViewSettings(, or BarcodeArView.forModeWithViewSettingsAndCameraSettings( is used to construct the view (semantic)
BarcodeArView is created inside initState() (semantic)
BarcodeArView is stored as a class field (semantic)
highlightProvider = this (or equivalent) is set on the BarcodeArView
A class implements BarcodeArHighlightProvider and defines highlightForBarcode( (semantic)
highlightForBarcode returns a Future<BarcodeArHighlight?> (async provider pattern)
BarcodeArRectangleHighlight( barcode ) is returned from the provider
barcodeAr.addListener( is called to register the session listener
Import from scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_ar is present
Import from scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode is present

evals.prompt: Add MatrixScan AR barcode scanning to ProductListBloc.dart. When a new barcode is tracked, add it to the scannedItems list and emit through the existing stream. Show a rectangle highlight for each tracked barcode.
evals.expected_output: The skill adds BarcodeAr to ProductListBloc.dart alongside the existing stream/state code. The BLoC implements BarcodeArListener. The page State implements BarcodeArHighlightProvider. All existing stream controller, list, and clear logic are preserved.

assertions.text: The BLoC implements BarcodeArListener
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is present
BarcodeAr( settings ) is used
One of BarcodeArView.forMode(, BarcodeArView.forModeWithViewSettings(, or BarcodeArView.forModeWithViewSettingsAndCameraSettings( is used to construct the view (semantic)
barcodeAr.addListener(this) is called
didUpdateSession( is present
session.addedTrackedBarcodes is accessed to get newly tracked barcodes
Newly tracked barcodes are appended to the existing scannedItems list
Existing scannedItems list is preserved
Existing _scannedItemsController is preserved and emits on new scans
Existing clear() method is preserved
Import from scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_ar is present

evals.prompt: I want to add an info annotation to each tracked barcode in my Flutter MatrixScan AR app. The annotation should show the barcode's data in a medium-width tooltip that appears immediately when the barcode is scanned.
evals.expected_output: The skill adds BarcodeArAnnotationProvider to the page State and wires annotationForBarcode to return a BarcodeArInfoAnnotation with the barcode data in the body. The annotation trigger is set to HighlightTapAndBarcodeScan so it appears on scan.

assertions.text: A class implements BarcodeArAnnotationProvider
annotationForBarcode( is present
annotationForBarcode returns a Future<BarcodeArAnnotation?> (async)
BarcodeArInfoAnnotation( barcode ) is constructed
BarcodeArInfoAnnotationBodyComponent is created with the barcode data as text
annotation.body = [...] is set
annotationProvider = this (or equivalent) is set on the BarcodeArView
Existing integration code (BarcodeAr, BarcodeArView, BarcodeArHighlightProvider, listener) is preserved

evals.prompt: Replace the default rectangle highlight in my MatrixScan AR Flutter app with a custom Flutter widget — a blue circle with the barcode data text inside it. Wire this up using BarcodeArCustomHighlight.
evals.expected_output: The skill returns a BarcodeArCustomHighlight from the highlightForBarcode provider, supplying a Flutter widget (e.g. a Container/CircleAvatar with the barcode text). The import from scandit_flutter_datacapture_barcode_ar is present. The snapshot limitation for animated widgets is noted.

assertions.text: BarcodeArCustomHighlight( is returned from highlightForBarcode
barcode: barcode is passed to BarcodeArCustomHighlight
child: ... is passed to BarcodeArCustomHighlight with a Flutter widget
barcode.data is present in the widget child passed to BarcodeArCustomHighlight (semantic)
A blue or circle-shaped widget is used as the child
Existing integration code (BarcodeArView, listener, annotationProvider if present) is preserved

evals.prompt: I want to add a responsive annotation to my MatrixScan AR Flutter app: when the barcode is close (large on screen), show a large info annotation with a header 'Product' and two body rows. When the barcode is far away, show only a small annotation with one body row.
evals.expected_output: The skill constructs two BarcodeArInfoAnnotation instances (one large with header and two body rows, one small with one body row), wraps them in BarcodeArResponsiveAnnotation, and returns it from annotationForBarcode.

assertions.text: Two BarcodeArInfoAnnotation instances are created (closeup and faraway)
BarcodeArInfoAnnotationWidthPreset.large is present
BarcodeArInfoAnnotationHeader( is present
The closeup annotation has two BarcodeArInfoAnnotationBodyComponent entries in its body list (semantic)
One of BarcodeArInfoAnnotationWidthPreset.small or BarcodeArInfoAnnotationWidthPreset.medium is set on the faraway annotation (semantic)
The faraway annotation has exactly one BarcodeArInfoAnnotationBodyComponent entry in its body list (semantic)
BarcodeArResponsiveAnnotation( barcode, closeup, faraway ) is constructed
annotationProvider = this is set on the BarcodeArView
Existing integration code (BarcodeAr, BarcodeArView, highlight provider, listener) is preserved
